description: Identity-level metadata for a plugin publisher. One record per publisher DID, located at rkey `self`. Optional: a DID may publish packages without ever publishing a publisher.profile, in which case clients fall back to the publisher's handle and per-package metadata for display. EXPERIMENTAL: this NSID is part of the experimental phase of the EmDash plugin registry. The shape is expected to migrate to either pm.fair.publisher.profile (if FAIR adopts it) or com.emdashcms.publisher.profile once stable.

main.description: A publisher's identity-level profile. Distinct from `com.emdashcms.experimental.package.profile`, which carries per-package metadata. The publisher profile is the canonical landing page for the entity behind a DID: 'who is publishing these packages?'. The record key is the literal string `self`. Per-package fields like `authors[]` and `security[]` on package profile records remain authoritative for their respective packages and MAY differ from the values here; clients render package-level fields when present, falling back to publisher profile values otherwise. The publisher profile's `displayName` is the value that `com.emdashcms.experimental.publisher.verification` records bind against — see that lexicon's docs for the validity rules.

displayName.description: Human-readable name for the publisher (e.g. 'Acme Plugin Co.'). Displayed alongside packages and verification badges. Verification records bind against this value: a change to displayName invalidates any unexpired verification claims targeting this DID until the issuer re-attests.

description.description: Short description / bio of the publisher. SHOULD NOT exceed 280 characters per UI convention. Plain text; no Markdown.

url.description: Publisher's primary homepage. Distinct from per-package repo or homepage URLs.

contact.description: Identity-level contact channels for the publisher (general / security). Per-package security contacts on package profile records remain authoritative for their respective packages; this list is for the publisher entity itself.

updatedAt.description: When this profile was last updated.

contact.description: Identity-level publisher contact. At least one of url or email MUST be present; Lexicon cannot express required-one-of, so aggregators MUST validate this and reject records carrying a contact with neither field. Same shape as `com.emdashcms.experimental.package.profile#contact`.

kind.description: Channel role. 'general' for ordinary contact, 'security' for vulnerability reporting.
